rules.rule: every extracted candidate MUST trace to: source_evidence_id, decomposition_id, extraction_rule_id, extraction_runtime_id, reviewer attribution, and continuity_chain (if temporal).
lineage is append-only; in-place mutation is FORBIDDEN.
broken lineage chains (any pointer that does not resolve) are fail-closed.
lineage events MUST cite the manifest sha256 of every linked artifact for replay verification.
supersedence MUST cite predecessor candidate_id and successor candidate_id; silent replacement is FORBIDDEN.
